title: Current field model
caption: Every custom field hangs off the Contact — sale, attribution, and consent data all overwrite per person.
src:
erDiagram
  CONTACT ||--o{ OPPORTUNITY : "has many"
  CONTACT {
    string id PK
    string first_name
    string last_name
    string email
    string phone
    string utm_source "OVERWRITES per touch"
    string utm_medium "OVERWRITES per touch"
    string utm_campaign "OVERWRITES per touch"
    string utm_content "OVERWRITES per touch"
    string utm_term "OVERWRITES per touch"
    string gclid_value "0 of 6016 scanned (11077 total)"
    string fbclid_value "0 of 6016 scanned (11077 total)"
    string source_url "OVERWRITES per touch"
    string sale_outcome "OVERWRITES per deal"
    string product_sold_1 "OVERWRITES per deal"
    string product_sold_2 "OVERWRITES per deal"
    string product_sold_3 "OVERWRITES per deal"
    monetary total_program_amount "OVERWRITES per deal"
    monetary treatment_cost "OVERWRITES per deal"
    monetary consultation_fee "OVERWRITES per deal"
    string pay_type "OVERWRITES per deal"
    string patient_advisor "legacy field - renamed to Patient Care Consultant (PCC)"
    string ad_reason "ambiguous - reads as advertising"
    string ad_other_explanation
    string sms_consent_status "0 of 6016 scanned (11077 total)"
    string sms_optin_date "0 of 6016 scanned (11077 total)"
    string consent_source "0 of 6016 scanned (11077 total)"
    string consent_timestamp "0 of 6016 scanned (11077 total)"
    string emergency_contact_name
    string emergency_contact_phone
    string primary_care_provider_name
    string PLUS_75_more "intake clinical consent etc"
  }
  OPPORTUNITY {
    string id PK
    string contact_id FK
    string pipeline_id FK
    string stage_id FK
    monetary monetary_value "57-99 percent are 0"
    string ZERO_custom_fields "no opp-level data exists"
  }

title: Current pipelines
caption: 18 pipelines: location clones, status-as-pipeline, and the A and D pipeline that auto-creates 939 false wins.
src:
flowchart TD
  Root["18 Pipelines"]
  Root --> LocClone["4 location clones"]
  LocClone --> L1["Newport News"]
  LocClone --> L2["Richmond"]
  LocClone --> L3["Virginia Beach"]
  LocClone --> L4["Virtual - 0 wins"]
  Root --> Status["4 status-as-pipeline"]
  Status --> S1["Non Booked - 733 opps stuck"]
  Status --> S2["No Show / Cancel"]
  Status --> S3["Lost / Dead"]
  Status --> S4["A and D - 939 false WINS"]
  Root --> Disp["1 disposition log"]
  Disp --> D1["z Call Disposition"]
  Root --> Process["4 sales / process"]
  Process --> P1["MWC Sales Production"]
  Process --> P2["MWC Lead Pipeline - 17 stages"]
  Process --> P3["JJ Funnel - 4 stages"]
  Process --> P4["Renewals"]
  Root --> Ref["3 referral clones"]
  Ref --> R1["Ambassador Referrals"]
  Ref --> R2["PCC Referrals"]
  Ref --> R3["Referral Rewards"]
  Root --> Ret["1 retention"]
  Ret --> RP["Retention Pipeline"]
  Root --> Other["1 channel-specific"]
  Other --> O1["Instagram DM"]

  classDef bad fill:#fee2e2,stroke:#dc2626,color:#991b1b,stroke-width:2px
  classDef redundant fill:#fef3c7,stroke:#d97706,color:#92400e
  classDef stuck fill:#fef3c7,stroke:#d97706,color:#92400e
  classDef keep fill:#dbeafe,stroke:#2563eb,color:#1e40af
  classDef root fill:#08428c,stroke:#08428c,color:#fff,stroke-width:2px

  class Root root
  class S4 bad
  class S1 stuck
  class L1,L2,L3,L4 redundant
  class R1,R2,R3 redundant
  class O1 keep

title: Target object model
caption: Four destinations. Contact owns identity, attribution, and consent; the Opportunity owns the deal and money as one canonical set of 35 custom fields (the PCC Sales Form lists the identical set), with attribution copied on by WF-01 at create; EMR stays external. monetary_value is a native field (net collected). No custom objects.
src:
erDiagram
  CONTACT ||--o{ OPPORTUNITY : "has many (1 per deal)"
  CONTACT ||--o| EXTERNAL_EMR : "sync via emr_patient_id"
  OPPORTUNITY ||--o| EMR_VISIT : "per visit (emr_visit_id)"

  CONTACT {
    string id PK
    string first_name
    string last_name
    string email
    string phone
    date dob
    string ambassador_slug "unique"
    string sms_consent_status "canonical, WF 11 owned"
    date sms_consent_updated_at "WF 11 owned"
    string dnd_state "WF 11 owned"
    string utm_source "first/last touch"
    string utm_medium
    string utm_campaign
    string gclid "captured at form"
    string fbclid "captured at form"
    string source_url
    string emr_patient_id FK "EMR sync key"
    string communication_preference
  }
  OPPORTUNITY {
    string id PK
    string contact_id FK
    string pipeline_id FK
    string stage_id FK
    monetary monetary_value "native; net collected (netTotal)"
    string sale_outcome "form; SOLD/AD/MUT/MAR"
    string sale_type "form; new/renewal"
    string appt_status "form; showed/no-show/cancel/reschedule"
    string patient_care_consultant_id "form sole writer; WF 12 reads"
    string provider "form"
    string product_sold_1 "form"
    string product_sold_2 "form"
    string product_sold_3 "form"
    string term_1 "form; drives renewal_date"
    string term_2 "form"
    string term_3 "form"
    monetary price_1 "form"
    monetary price_2 "form"
    monetary price_3 "form"
    monetary total_program_amount "form; gross"
    monetary consultation_fee "form"
    monetary money_down "form"
    monetary discount_value "form"
    string discount_type "form; pct/dollar"
    string pay_type "form; PIF or financed"
    string ad_reason "form; field name unchanged from legacy"
    string ad_reason_other "form"
    string referred_by "form; new only"
    string consult_notes "form"
    string emr_visit_id "EMR sync"
    string location "WF 01 at create; 4 values"
    date renewal_date "WF 05 at Won = Won date + term_1"
    int visit_feedback_score "WF 10 survey"
    string call_disposition "WF 12"
    datetime outcome_processed_at "WF 05 idempotency stamp"
    string utm_source "WF 01 attribution copy at create"
    string utm_campaign "WF 01 attribution copy at create"
    string gclid "WF 01 attribution copy at create"
    string fbclid "WF 01 attribution copy at create"
    string lead_source "WF 01 attribution copy at create"
  }
  EXTERNAL_EMR {
    string emr_patient_id PK "GHL link only"
    string all_clinical_PHI "stays in EMR"
  }
  EMR_VISIT {
    string emr_visit_id PK
    string visit_data "stays in EMR"
  }

title: Target pipelines
caption: Sales, Retention and Renewals, Referrals, and the Instagram DM exception. Every stage names its writer; stages move by form, booking events, or manual PCC action (G1-safe, never field-wiping workflow moves). Referrals is tracking-only and excluded from revenue rollups.
src:
flowchart TD
  Root["4 Pipelines - stages moved by form, booking events, or manual (G1-safe)"]
  Root --> Sales["Sales - Lead to Close"]
  Sales --> S1["New Lead: WF-01 at create"]
  S1 --> S2["Booked: WF-03 on booking"]
  S2 --> S3["Confirmed: WF-03 on confirm"]
  S3 --> S4["Showed: PCC Sales Form (appt_status)"]
  S4 --> S5["Won: PCC Sales Form (sale_outcome sold)"]
  Sales --> SE["Exits: No-Show / Cancelled (WF-08), A&D (AD) / MUT (form), Disqualified (manual)"]
  Root --> Ret["Retention and Renewals"]
  Ret --> RS["Onboarding: WF-06 - Active - Renewal Due: WF-09 - Renewed: form"]
  Ret --> RE["Exit: Churned (manual)"]
  Root --> Refer["Referrals - TRACKING ONLY (no revenue)"]
  Refer --> FS["Submitted: WF-15 - Qualified/Booked/Showed: WF-15 or form - Rewarded: WF-14"]
  Refer --> FE["Exit: Invalid (manual)"]
  Refer --> FN["Carries no monetary_value; the Sales opportunity holds all revenue"]
  Root --> Insta["Instagram DM (exception)"]
  Insta --> IS["7 existing stages kept"]
  Insta --> IN["ManyChat path stays separate"]

  classDef root fill:#08428c,stroke:#08428c,color:#fff,stroke-width:2px
  classDef new fill:#dcfce7,stroke:#16a34a,color:#166534,stroke-width:2px
  classDef kept fill:#dbeafe,stroke:#2563eb,color:#1e40af
  classDef track fill:#fef3c7,stroke:#d97706,color:#92400e

  class Root root
  class Sales,Ret new
  class Refer track
  class Insta kept
